title: Instructional-text translation (multilingual)
context: The print-and-use instructions, quick-start guides, and style guide are currently written in English. For the manipulatives to be maximally useful in non-English-speaking classrooms and homes -- which include a large fraction of the under-resourced settings this project targets -- at least the print instructions and one quick-start guide should be translated. Translation is prioritised if the first confirmed distribution channel serves a non-English-speaking community.
objective: Translate the print-and-use instructions and at least one quick-start guide into at least one language other than English, with native-speaker review.
acceptanceCriteria: At least one target language is selected based on the confirmed distribution channel's community (not arbitrarily chosen).
The print-and-use instructions document (math-manip-writing-001 output) is fully translated into the target language.
At least one quick-start guide (math-manip-writing-003 output) is translated into the target language.
Translations are reviewed by a native speaker with at least secondary-education-level mathematical literacy; reviewer recorded.
Translated documents are published CC-BY-4.0 with the same attribution as the English originals.
output: Translated versions of the print-and-use instructions and at least one quick-start guide (e.g. docs/translations/es/print-and-use-instructions.md), CC-BY-4.0, with native-speaker reviewer sign-off.
